title: Your Chat History, Finally Yours.
subtitle: Local storage and privacy first, with AI agents and visual insights to help you revisit your chat memories.
localOnlyDetail: Data is stored in this browser's site storage. Clearing site data also removes imported sessions.
initializingDetail: The first launch loads the SQLite runtime and opens browser storage.

unsupported.title: This browser cannot run the local edition
unsupported.description: Use the latest Chrome, Edge, or another OPFS-capable browser, and open ChatLab through localhost or HTTPS.

error.title: The local workspace hit a problem
error.unsupportedFile: This file is not supported yet. Choose ChatLab JSON / JSONL, WhatsApp TXT, LINE TXT, QQ TXT, or Telegram JSON.

import.title: Add a chat archive
import.description: ChatLab JSON / JSONL, WhatsApp TXT, LINE TXT, QQ TXT, and Telegram JSON are supported. Each import creates an isolated session.
import.drop: Drop a file here, or choose from your device

multiChat.title: Choose chats to import
multiChat.successDetail: Created {sessions} of {total} sessions and saved {messages} messages.
multiChat.cancelledWithCompleted: Import stopped; {count} completed sessions were kept.

import.cancelled: Import stopped without leaving an incomplete session.

sessions.title: Your chat archive
sessions.description: Sessions are stored separately in this browser. You can manage them and view their 24-hour message activity.
sessions.emptyDescription: Import your first chat archive from the left and it will appear here.
sessions.deleteDescription: This session's local database will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

analysis.title: 24-hour activity for “{name}”
analysis.description: Statistics are computed in a local background thread and grouped in this device's time zone.
analysis.noData: This session has no hourly activity to display yet.
